import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Obtener una versión específica de un workflow"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/workflows/{id}/versions/{version}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



<details>
<summary><strong>Permisos requeridos</strong></summary>

**Dashboard:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `workflows.dashboard.read`
- `workflows.dashboard.manage`

**API Keys:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `workflows.api.read`
- `workflows.api.manage`

</details>



Obtener una versión específica de un workflow

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"id","in":"path","description":"ID del workflow","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"wf_1B2M2Y8AsgTpgAmY7PhCfg"}},{"name":"version","in":"path","description":"Número de versión del workflow","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","example":3}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Versión encontrada","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"version":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"version":{"type":"integer","example":3},"saved_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-03-21T10:00:00Z"},"workflow_name":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Customer Onboarding"},"status":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"published"}},"title":"WorkflowVersionSummary"},{"type":"object","properties":{"snapshot":{"type":"object","properties":{"token":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"wf_1B2M2Y8AsgTpgAmY7PhCfg"},"name":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Customer Onboarding"},"description":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Orquesta revisión legal y transición de estado"},"status":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"published"},"settings":{"type":"object","properties":{"failure_alerts":{"type":"object","properties":{"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"Envía un correo cuando una ejecución del workflow termina en estado failed.","example":false}},"title":"WorkflowFailureAlertsSettings"}},"title":"WorkflowSettings"},"starting_step_id":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"66f01d4f1d0b5a4f7a9c1111"},"steps":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":true}}},"title":"WorkflowSnapshot"}}}],"title":"WorkflowVersionDetail"},"current_version":{"type":"integer","example":5}},"title":"WorkflowVersionResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Error de autenticación","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","detail"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"authentication_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Unauthorized"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":401},"detail":{"type":"string","example":"We could not authenticate your credentials. Please check the documentation at https://docs.soyio.id"}}}}}},"404":{"description":"Recurso no encontrado","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","detail"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"invalid_request_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Resource not found"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":404},"detail":{"type":"string","example":"Couldn't find <resource> with id '<id>'. Please check your request and try again"}},"title":"NotFoundErrorSchema"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
